text: The galaxy doesn't belong to the fastest or the strongest. It belongs to whoever is still standing when everyone else has run out of options.
attr: COMMANDER DOCTRINE — TERRAN LEAGUE FIELD MANUAL

text: Every star system we leave behind is a system that can still burn us. We don't retreat. We redeploy.
attr: GENERAL KIRA VOSS, TERRAN LEAGUE — LAST KNOWN BROADCAST

text: We are not dying. We are crystallizing. Each fragment that breaks away becomes something sharper, something eternal.
attr: THE UNDYING SCRIPTURE — ETERNAL SHARDS CODEX

text: Order is a lie told by the strong to the weak. We are the truth beneath that lie.
Death is not an end. It is a data state. And we know how to read data.
The species that cannot share power will not survive to exercise it. Unity is not compromise — it is multiplication.
attr: THE COVENANT TEXT — UNITY ACCORD FOUNDING PRINCIPLES

text: We do not conquer. We consume. The distinction matters to those who have not yet been consumed.
We built this galaxy. We encoded its laws into the substrate of spacetime. We are not gods. We are the architects of gods.
attr: FIRST PRIME — CORE GUARDIANS ACTIVATION LOG

text: Seven factions. Seven answers to the same question: how does a civilization survive the death of its star?
attr: GALACTIC COMMISSION FINAL REPORT, YEAR ZERO

text: The auto-battle resolves. The commander decides. Never confuse the tool for the strategist.
attr: ASHES OF COMMAND — GAME DESIGN DOCTRINE
